steps.t: Esgaroth-of-old can be found to the east of Eryn Lasgalen on the banks of the Long Lake. Thranduil has learned that Karazgar's agents have returned to…
Slain drakelings can be found near the bones of Smaug in Esgaroth-of-old. You have discovered the smuggled drakelings laid bare in Esgaroth-of-old as …
Karazgar might be found somewhere in Esgaroth-of-old. You should search for Karazgar in Esgaroth-of-old. He might be found near the bones of Smaug.
The path of slain Men can be found along the broken bridge to Esgaroth-of-old. You have not found any sign of the Weeping Warrior, but you discovered …
The cold-drake can be found amid the bones of Smaug in Esgaroth-of-old. You have not found Karazgar, but a dying cold-drake stares towards the bones o…
King Thorin III can be found in the Hall Under the Mountain. A cold-drake has delivered a chilling threat against the people of the North. You should …
